response.overview: A year ago, Royal Challengers Bangalore finally got what they had spent nearly two decades chasing. The celebrations ended. The wait was over. But winning changes everything. Now, every team wants a piece of the champions. Every mistake is magnified. Every victory is expected. And somewhere in the noise, the question grows louder: Was 2025 the ending of a story... or just the beginning of one? Because defending a title is hard. Defending a legacy is harder.
response.title: IPL 2026: RCB - The Rule
